chapter_title.en: What Garments Are Permissible for Prayer and What Garments Are Not

text: 754 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: «يُصَلِّي فِيهِ فَإِذَا وَجَدَ اَلْمَاءَ غَسَلَهُ وَ أَعَادَ اَلصَّلاَةَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.754 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"He should pray in it, and when he finds water, he should wash it and repeat the prayer."
